Location.description: Name of the wall or roof which contains the opening.

Name.description: Unique name which identifies this opening.  Can be just a number, e.g. "1".  However, an opening cannot have the same name as a wall.

Type.description: The name of the SAP-Opening-Type for this opening.

Height.description: The height of the opening in metres.  If the Height field is used to record the opening area, set the Width to 1.

Width.description: The width of the opening in metres.  If the Width field is used to record the opening area, set the Height to 1.

Orientation.description: Compass direction in which the opening faces.

Pitch.description: Pitch of roof containing roof window.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
